creator: bugs.freebsd.asc@schwarzes.net
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #21)
> Can you check if a driver is attached to the graphics card?
> xf86-video-vesa looks to see if a driver is attached to the graphics card, and 
> don't want to work then.
> Are you using efi or bios boot?

I'm using EFI boot. 

When looking to dmesg, there is a problem to register the vesa kernel module,
maybe this causes the problems with driver.

[...]
netmap: loaded module
[ath_hal] loaded
module_register_init: MOD_LOAD (vesa, 0xffffffff810f9a00, 0) error 19
random: registering fast source Intel Secure Key RNG
random: fast provider: "Intel Secure Key RNG"
[...]
